assumptions: The intragroup dividend receivable is a foreign-currency-denominated monetary item.
The related foreign exchange gains or losses are not fully eliminated on consolidation and can affect consolidated profit or loss.

approaches.label: Intragroup monetary item hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 expressly allows the foreign currency risk of an intragroup monetary item to be designated as a hedged item in consolidated financial statements when that exposure is not fully eliminated on consolidation.
